message:
chore: bump version to 0.2.2

Reflects the poisoned-mutex safety fixes in broadcast and watch channels
and the audit regression test additions across runtime and server modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ exclude = ["fuzz"]
 
 [package]
 name = "asupersync"
-version = "0.2.0"
+version = "0.2.2"
 edition = "2021"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Spec-first, cancel-correct, capability-secure async runtime for Rust."
